Ferris C. Vitae — Resume

Rendered from resume.json via ferrocv.

This page is auto-built on every push to main. Rendered output:

  • resume.pdf — PDF, rendered with the typst-jsonresume-cv theme
  • resume.html — HTML, rendered with the text-minimal theme
  • resume.txt — plain text, rendered with the text-minimal theme
This is a starter template. See the source repo for instructions on forking your own.
